name: sunburst-chart

en.when_to_use: Use it to show a proportional hierarchy (disk usage, budgets, category composition) with click-to-drill-down navigation and breadcrumbs. For a purely structural tree such as reporting lines or folders, use d3-org-chart; for a mind map, use markmap or mind-elixir. Data is a {name,value,children} hierarchy with value on leaves.
en.why_valuable: A zoomable sunburst requires d3 partition layout, arc generation, and animated zoom transitions for drilling down, and hand-written drill-down animation is very fragile. This turnkey component turns a hierarchy into a clickable radial drill-down chart.

data_in.note: Default accessors are label='name', size='value', and children='children' (all verified against the README method table). Leaf nodes provide value; d3-hierarchy automatically sums internal node values, so value may be omitted when children is present.

root.name: string -- node label, read by the default label accessor
root.value?: number -- leaf size, read by the default size accessor; may be omitted when children is present
root.children?: Node[] -- child-node array; omit for leaves

spec.note: The sunburst is radial and uses the smaller container dimension as its diameter. Default height is 500px; set the height before construction and do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 展示占比型层级(磁盘/预算/分类构成)并要点击逐层下钻 + 面包屑时用它;纯结构树(谁汇报谁、文件夹)用 d3-org-chart,思维导图用 markmap/mind-elixir。数据是 {name,value,children} 层级树,叶子给 value。
why_valuable: 可缩放旭日图涉及 d3 partition 布局 + 弧生成 + 下钻缩放过渡动画,AI 徒手写下钻动画极易崩;turnkey 组件喂层级树即出可点击下钻的放射图。

data_in.note: 默认访问器 label='name'、size='value'、children='children'(均已从 README 方法表核实);叶子节点给 value,内部节点值由 d3-hierarchy 自动累加(有 children 时可省 value)。

root.name: string —— 节点标签(label 访问器默认读 name)
root.value?: number —— 叶子大小(size 访问器默认读 value);有 children 时可省略
root.children?: Node[] —— 子节点数组;叶子省略

spec.note: 旭日图为放射状,读取容器尺寸取较小边为直径;默认 height 500px,构造前设好高度,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 钉死层级字段 name/value/children,叶子给 value。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;下钻/点击焦点若需外传,由消费 AI 接 .onClick(node) 原生回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: conditional:svg 与 tooltip 落 shadow 容器;但 float-tooltip 把其 CSS 注入 document.head(shadow 内 tooltip 会缺样式但仍可用)。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,d3 经嵌套 +esm 自解析,无 worker/wasm。

isolation.evidence: 默认导出是 SunburstChart 类(dts: declare class SunburstChart {...};export{SunburstChart as default})。实例化为 new Sunburst(<DOMElement>)(README: const myChart = new Sunburst(<myDOMElement>))——已用 new 模式,非旧 curried。默认访问器从 README 方法表核实:children→'children'、label→'name'、size→'value'(dts 的 data(rootNode:Node) 与 children/label/size 访问器方法一致),故数据 {name,value,children}。globalStyleInjection=yes:+esm(11554B,内联 d3-hierarchy/shape/scale/transition + float-tooltip)grep 命中 document.head||...getElementsByTagName("head")...createElement("style")——float-tooltip 的 tooltip CSS 注入 head。globalDomMutation=no:svg 与 tooltip DOM 建在传入容器内,无 document.body append。globalEvents=no。
